channel.title: Meridian
channel.description: Venture capital, emerging technologies, and the companies shaping the future.
channel.itunes:author: Meridian
channel.itunes:summary: Venture capital, emerging technologies, and the companies shaping the future.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: The .5 Trillion Bet
item.description: SpaceX is targeting a .5 trillion IPO in 2026. Through a VC lens, we break down Starlink, Starship, the xAI merger, and whether it's actually cheap or genuinely overpriced. Meridian — Venture Science EP001
item.itunes:summary: SpaceX is targeting a .5 trillion IPO in 2026. Through a VC lens, we break down Starlink, Starship, the xAI merger, and whether it's actually cheap or genuinely overpriced. Meridian — Venture Science EP001

item.title: SpaceX IPO: The .5 Trillion Bet
item.description: SpaceX is targeting a .5 trillion IPO in 2026. Through a VC lens, we break down Starlink, Starship, the xAI merger, and whether it's actually cheap or genuinely overpriced.
item.itunes:summary: SpaceX is targeting a .5 trillion IPO in 2026. Through a VC lens, we break down Starlink, Starship, the xAI merger, and whether it's actually cheap or genuinely overpriced.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Deep Dive
item.description: A solo narrator analysis of SpaceX's .5T IPO valuation — Starlink, Starship, xAI merger, and whether it's worth investing.
item.itunes:summary: A solo narrator analysis of SpaceX's .5T IPO valuation — Starlink, Starship, xAI merger, and whether it's worth investing.
